titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 51: The Jigsaw Puzzle
Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol.51 The ジグソーパズル

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series vol. 51: The Jigsaw Puzzle features more than 200 different jigsaw puzzles, and the player can choose the difficulty level and there are different subjects and styles.
